items.name: compilation-test-windows
items.author: jane.smith
items.slo_yaml:
api_version: tropek/v1
kind: SLO
metadata:
  name: compilation-test-windows
  labels:
    os: windows
    test_type: compilation
spec:
  comparison:
    compare_with: several_results
    number_of_comparison_results: 3
    include_result_with_score: pass_or_warn
    aggregate_function: avg
  objectives:
    - sli_name: compilation_errors
      display_name: Compilation Errors
      pass:
        - criteria: ["=0"]
      weight: 3
      key_sli: true
      tab_group: summary
    - sli_name: compilation_duration_s
      display_name: Compilation Duration
      pass:
        - criteria: ["<=+10%"]
      warning:
        - criteria: ["<=+20%"]
      weight: 2
      key_sli: false
      tab_group: summary
    - sli_name: error_rate
      display_name: Error Rate
      pass:
        - criteria: ["<1.0"]
      warning:
        - criteria: ["<2.0"]
      weight: 3
      key_sli: true
      tab_group: summary
    - sli_name: cpu_usage_avg
      display_name: CPU Usage Avg
      pass:
        - criteria: ["<80"]
      warning:
        - criteria: ["<90"]
      weight: 2
      key_sli: false
      tab_group: resources
    - sli_name: memory_peak_mb
      display_name: Peak Memory
      pass:
        - criteria: ["<2048"]
      weight: 2
      key_sli: false
      tab_group: resources
    - sli_name: link_errors
      display_name: Link Errors
      pass:
        - criteria: ["=0"]
      weight: 3
      key_sli: true
      tab_group: errors
    - sli_name: test_failures
      display_name: Test Failures
      pass:
        - criteria: ["=0"]
      weight: 3
      key_sli: true
      tab_group: errors
  total_score:
    pass: "90%"
    warning: "75%"

items.name: compilation-test-linux
items.author: john.doe
items.notes: Linux variant with swap and disk I/O tracking
items.slo_yaml:
api_version: tropek/v1
kind: SLO
metadata:
  name: compilation-test-linux
  labels:
    os: linux
    test_type: compilation
spec:
  comparison:
    compare_with: several_results
    number_of_comparison_results: 3
    include_result_with_score: pass_or_warn
    aggregate_function: avg
  objectives:
    - sli_name: compilation_errors
      display_name: Compilation Errors
      pass:
        - criteria: ["=0"]
      weight: 3
      key_sli: true
      tab_group: summary
    - sli_name: compilation_duration_s
      display_name: Compilation Duration
      pass:
        - criteria: ["<=+10%"]
      warning:
        - criteria: ["<=+20%"]
      weight: 2
      key_sli: false
      tab_group: summary
    - sli_name: swap_usage_mb
      display_name: Swap Usage
      pass:
        - criteria: ["<256"]
      weight: 1
      key_sli: false
      tab_group: resources
    - sli_name: disk_io_write_mbps
      display_name: Disk Write
      pass:
        - criteria: ["<100"]
      weight: 1
      key_sli: false
      tab_group: resources
    - sli_name: link_errors
      display_name: Link Errors
      pass:
        - criteria: ["=0"]
      weight: 3
      key_sli: true
      tab_group: errors
  total_score:
    pass: "90%"
    warning: "75%"

items.name: load-test-linux
items.author: ops-team
items.notes: Performance load test for Linux nodes. v3 adds network metrics.
items.slo_yaml:
api_version: tropek/v1
kind: SLO
metadata:
  name: load-test-linux
  labels:
    os: linux
    test_type: load
spec:
  comparison:
    compare_with: several_results
    number_of_comparison_results: 5
    include_result_with_score: pass_or_warn
    aggregate_function: avg
  objectives:
    - sli_name: response_time_p95
      display_name: Response Time P95
      pass:
        - criteria: ["<550"]
      warning:
        - criteria: ["<700"]
      weight: 2
      key_sli: true
      tab_group: timing
    - sli_name: response_time_p99
      display_name: Response Time P99
      pass:
        - criteria: ["<=+10%"]
      warning:
        - criteria: ["<900"]
      weight: 2
      key_sli: true
      tab_group: timing
    - sli_name: throughput_rps
      display_name: Throughput
      pass:
        - criteria: [">1200"]
      warning:
        - criteria: [">1000"]
      weight: 2
      key_sli: false
      tab_group: summary
    - sli_name: error_rate
      display_name: Error Rate
      pass:
        - criteria: ["<1.0"]
      warning:
        - criteria: ["<2.0"]
      weight: 3
      key_sli: true
      tab_group: summary
    - sli_name: packet_loss_pct
      display_name: Packet Loss
      pass:
        - criteria: ["<0.1"]
      warning:
        - criteria: ["<0.5"]
      weight: 2
      key_sli: true
      tab_group: network
    - sli_name: connection_errors
      display_name: Connection Errors
      pass:
        - criteria: ["=0"]
      weight: 2
      key_sli: true
      tab_group: network
  total_score:
    pass: "90%"
    warning: "75%"

items.name: load-test-windows
items.author: ops-team
items.notes: Performance load test for Windows nodes
items.slo_yaml:
api_version: tropek/v1
kind: SLO
metadata:
  name: load-test-windows
  labels:
    os: windows
    test_type: load
spec:
  comparison:
    compare_with: several_results
    number_of_comparison_results: 5
    include_result_with_score: pass_or_warn
    aggregate_function: avg
  objectives:
    - sli_name: response_time_p95
      display_name: Response Time P95
      pass:
        - criteria: ["<600"]
      warning:
        - criteria: ["<750"]
      weight: 2
      key_sli: true
      tab_group: timing
    - sli_name: response_time_p99
      display_name: Response Time P99
      pass:
        - criteria: ["<=+10%"]
      warning:
        - criteria: ["<950"]
      weight: 2
      key_sli: true
      tab_group: timing
    - sli_name: throughput_rps
      display_name: Throughput
      pass:
        - criteria: [">1100"]
      warning:
        - criteria: [">900"]
      weight: 2
      key_sli: false
      tab_group: summary
    - sli_name: error_rate
      display_name: Error Rate
      pass:
        - criteria: ["<1.5"]
      warning:
        - criteria: ["<3.0"]
      weight: 3
      key_sli: true
      tab_group: summary
    - sli_name: crash_count
      display_name: Crashes
      pass:
        - criteria: ["=0"]
      weight: 3
      key_sli: true
      tab_group: errors
  total_score:
    pass: "90%"
    warning: "75%"
